prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `5b526a93`.
codex_response:
Implemented the `5b526a93` ARC2 package. The rule is: extract the 3x3 hollow-ring anchors, take the Cartesian product of their row anchors and column anchors, and fill every missing lattice position with the same ring in color `8` while keeping the original `1` rings unchanged. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

Code is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b526a93/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b526a93/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b526a93/generator.py#L1). The generator stays close to the observed family: one fully populated blue row at the top or bottom, the other rows containing only the leftmost blue ring, with sampled margins and gaps matching the official layouts.

Validation passed:
- `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 5b526a93`: `3/3` official examples
- `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 5b526a93 --n-examples 1000`
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 5b526a93`: `1000/1000` generated examples

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b526a93/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b526a93/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b526a93/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b526a93/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b526a93/previews/preview_03.png). No terminal image renderer was available here, so the final sanity check was done by inspecting generated anchor layouts from the built `task.json`.
